properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The greatest love that anyone could ever know That overcame the cross and grave to find my soul And'til I see You face to face And grace amazing takes me home, I'll trust in You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: With all I am I live to see Your kingdom come And in my heart I pray you'd let Your will be done And'til I see You face to face And grace amazing takes me home, I'll trust in You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will live to love You I will live to bring You praise I will live a child in awe of You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are the voice that called the universe to be You are the whisper in my heart that speaks to me And'til I see You face to face And grace amazing takes me home, I'll trust in You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I will live to love You I will live to bring You praise I will live a child in awe of You I will live to love You I will live to bring You praise I will live a child in awe of You (hallelujah)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You alone are God of all You alone are worthy, Lord And with all I am my soul will bless Your name You alone are God of all You alone are worthy, Lord

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And with all I am my soul will bless Your name Bless Your name
